summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of MedSphere. All 15 pytest backend tests pass (after 2 minor test-side fixes). Frontend e2e flow (landing, register, login, doctors listing, doctor profile, slot booking, dashboard, AI chat bubble open, logout) works end-to-end. No console errors during patient e2e flow. Backend AI chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key returns valid responses (~5s).

minor.issue: Brute-force lockout requires >5 attempts in this environment (took ~6-10 attempts to hit 429). Likely because identifier uses request.client.host which behind ingress may be the proxy IP — still triggers 429 eventually, so functionality works. Consider using X-Forwarded-For or just email-based identifier for more deterministic behaviour.

issues: Stat cards labels (UPCOMING / PRESCRIPTIONS / AI ASSISTANT) use light green on near-white — readable but borderline contrast. Acceptable but could be darker.

action_items: (Optional) Brute-force identifier: consider deriving identifier from email only or X-Forwarded-For so 5 failed attempts always equals 429 — currently still works but takes a couple extra attempts behind the ingress.
(Optional) Slightly darken the dashboard stat labels for AA contrast.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~720 lines in one file; consider splitting into auth/doctors/appointments/ai modules for maintainability.
CORS allow_origins reads FRONTEND_URL (single origin) — good. CORS_ORIGINS env var in .env is set to '*' but unused. Remove dead env var.
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from all read endpoints via projections.
Cookies httpOnly + secure + samesite=none correctly set; works because preview URL is HTTPS.
bcrypt hashes generated via bcrypt.gensalt(), format starts with $2b$ — verified via login flow.
seed_admin updates existing admin password if it differs — playbook compliant.
Doctor registration creates an unapproved doctor profile (approved=false). list_doctors filters approved_only=true by default — good.
Appointment booking removes slot from doctor's available_slots — verified in test; race condition possible under concurrent bookings (no transaction).
test_credentials: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md: admin@medsphere.com/admin123, patient@test.com/password123, aanya.sharma@medsphere.com/password123. Plus dynamically-created TEST_* users.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_* prefixed users and one appointment + one prescription (Mild hypertension, Amlodipine 5mg) on Dr. Aanya Sharma for patient@test.com. These persist; main agent can clean up if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_medsphere.py covers health, register patient/doctor, login, /me, logout, duplicate-email rejection, doctors list/filter/specialties, doctor profile + availability update, full booking flow with role checks + slot removal + prescription creation, admin stats/users/doctors/approval, AI chat + history, and brute-force lockout. Just rerun `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Note: each run of the booking test consumes one of Dr. Aanya's slots; tests are resilient and re-seed slots if needed.
mocked_features_verified: Video consultation 'Join' is mocked per spec — not tested.
rca of the issue: None — no blocking issues. Two minor observations above.
